title: Teradyne And Advantest: A Duopoly In The Semiconductor Value Chain
text: Teradyne and Advantest dominate the semiconductor test equipment market with a combined market share of around 95%. I expect both companies to grow in line with the overall semiconductor market (6-8% CAGR) until 2030.

title: Why Is Teradyne (TER) Down 0.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Teradyne (TER) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
